command:
git commit -m t0027_literature_survey_morphology_ds_modeling [implementation]: add 5 priority-1 paper assets

Build paper assets for the five highest-priority candidates surfaced by research-internet:
- 10.1371_journal.pcbi.1009754 (Ezra-Tsur 2021): retinal SAC realistic-morphology DS model
- 10.1017_S0952523823000019 (Wu 2023): primate SAC dendritic-diameter morphology sweep
- 10.1038_s41593-017-0046-4 (Gruntman 2018): T4 fly DS via E-I synapse layout on dendrite
- 10.1038_s41598-018-23998-9 (Dan 2018): blowfly VS passive-cable transfer-resistance weighting
- 10.1038_12194 (Anderson 1999): V1 cortical DS does NOT require asymmetric dendrites (negative)

All five summaries follow paper asset spec v3 (frontmatter + 9 mandatory sections, >=500 words).
Two DOIs in the original task brief were corrected by the subagents during retrieval
(Stincic2023 -> Wu2023; Haag2018 -> Dan2018). Anderson1999 retrieved from INI UZH open repo
after Nature URL failed.
